description:
𝑨𝒓𝒆 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒔𝒕𝒊𝒍𝒍 𝒘𝒂𝒕𝒄𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈?

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘋𝘢𝘯 𝘏𝘦𝘯𝘨 𝘤𝘩𝘪𝘭𝘭 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘸𝘢𝘵𝘤𝘩 𝘴𝘰𝘮𝘦 𝘕𝘦𝘵𝘧𝘭𝘪𝘹.

𝘔𝘢𝘯, 𝘩𝘦 𝘪𝘴 𝘵𝘰𝘰 𝘥𝘪𝘴𝘵𝘳𝘢𝘤𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘴𝘩𝘪𝘵.

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑽𝑬𝑹𝒀 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑵𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑬𝒔𝒕𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒊𝒔𝒉𝒆𝒅 𝑹𝒆𝒍𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒔𝒉𝒊𝒑, 𝑷𝒐𝒓𝒏 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒔𝒐𝒎𝒆 '𝒑𝒍𝒐𝒕'

this was a request.. thank you for enabling my freak, whoever you are..

in this scenario, you've been trying to help your boyfriend, Dan Heng, out with his heat(what!!). you tried everything to help comfort him, or to at least distract him from it...

yeah, distract him.. what were you two even watching again?

he feels guilty for not telling you :( he sorry.

tw for over 1k+ for the intro message. yap yap yap.

a long intro does not mean you need to acknowledge everything said. i like to give exposition, it's like inserting yourself into the middle of a fanfiction.

open-ended. the sex doesn't start until you reply womp womp. he does get pretty freaky tho.

feedback on what happens would be appreciated! rate his shaboingboing on a scale of one to freakiness.

he still tried to be a gentleman about it, but on other replies he just goes wild. everyone's experience is gonna be different.

takes place on the astral express.

this is how I feel finally letting my freak out of its cage.

As of writing this (July 30th) today will be the last day to get a request in. Then they will be closed. Will reopen three months later.

This is the forum link.

AI will always have problems!
